concept: Authority, Clarity, Truth. High-contrast, function-first design for seamless event registration and powerful dashboard management. Combines stark minimal layouts with aggressive typography.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy combined with structural grids.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) with full height children. 'Control Room' protocol.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px-4px) for sharp, technical look.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-200, highly visible grid lines. Use border-collapse patterns.

components.buttons: Sharp corners, high contrast. Primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover. Secondary: bg-surface border border-border text-text_primary hover:bg-border.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight shadow, border darkens.
components.inputs: Shadcn based, sharp borders, focus ring in primary color. Not native. Minimal padding, strong borders.
components.navigation: Solid background (white) with hard bottom border. Sticky top.

media.description: Abstract black and white graphic design for event page backgrounds
Modern tech conference crowd for event listing thumbnails
Abstract minimalist geometric logo for placeholder branding

accessibility.contrast: APCA compliant. Text > 18px minimum 3:1, Normal text 4.5:1
accessibility.focus: High contrast ring. focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='login-submit-btn')

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/public event registration pages to achieve a Swiss Brutalist layout (asymmetrical grids, large typography).

Use Shadcn UI for the Admin Dashboard and complex registration forms, but aggressively customize them to remove 'Vercel-look'. Enforce sharp corners (rounded-none), high contrast borders, and flat surfaces.
Incorporate 'data-testid' attributes on all buttons, links, inputs, and functional UI components.
Implement ticket generation utilizing standard libraries (e.g., react-pdf, qrcode.react, react-barcode) to ensure BOTH Barcode & QR code are rendered simultaneously in the PDF.
Import Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and Satoshi (body) via @font-face or Google Fonts.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Never center-align all text; lean heavily on optical left-alignment and asymmetrical bento grids.
Do not use generic blue/purple gradients. Keep color usage strictly functional—Monochrome + pure #0055FF as the primary driver for interaction.
